channel.title: Professional Practices :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Working draft for faculty review. A lens is a standing question or practice applied across blocks, scope growing with capability — not a topic taught in one place. One of three lenses (with nine spirals and one bounded practice — 13 threads total). In one line: The individual craft of being a professional: documentation, version control, code style, code review, communication, self-reflection, estimation, and continued learning — each maturing as it recurs.
